docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY THE CITY TOW AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, HUMBERTO JAIME ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-23-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, HUMBERTO JAIME

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUZ, HUMBERTO JAIME $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,060.00, PLFT. TO RETAIN DEFT'S VEHICLE AND RELEASE IT TO DEFT. AFTER DEFT. PAYS ENTIRE JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW PETITION MAILED ON NOV 09, 2001
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW
ORDER OF THE COURT TO SET ASIDE TERMS MAILED TO DEFT RETURNED TO COURT: RETURN TO COURT, NO LONGER HERE
